violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the ware washing area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024
The hand-washing sink in the ware washing area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024
The hand-washing sink in the ware washing area and restroom were lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024

The door to the outside, located at both front entrances, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2024
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024
Establishment is lacking air drying racks. Cleaned and SANITIZED, EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS shall be air dried. PIC to install racks for air drying. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2024
The ceiling in the ware washing area is in poor repair, observed missing tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the retail area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2024
